note: Hosted at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mediaprophet/qualiaDB/refs/heads/main/manifests/ontologies.json — edit this file to add/update ontologies without recompiling the app.

ontologies.name: Schema.org
ontologies.description: Structured data vocabulary for the open web — persons, places, events, products.

ontologies.name: SKOS Core
ontologies.description: Simple Knowledge Organization System — thesauri, taxonomies, classification schemes.

ontologies.name: FOAF — Friend of a Friend
ontologies.description: Social network and personal profile vocabulary.

ontologies.name: Dublin Core Terms
ontologies.description: Metadata terms for describing digital resources — creator, date, format, rights.

ontologies.name: PROV-O Provenance
ontologies.description: W3C provenance ontology — tracks origin, history, and derivation of data.

ontologies.name: GeoNames Ontology
ontologies.description: Geographic features, country codes, administrative divisions, coordinates.

ontologies.name: DBpedia Ontology
ontologies.description: Classes and properties extracted from Wikipedia infoboxes — 760+ classes.

ontologies.name: English WordNet 2024
ontologies.description: Lexical database for English — synsets, hypernyms, hyponyms, meronyms, 170k entries.

ontologies.name: ChEBI Chemical Entities
ontologies.description: Chemical Entities of Biological Interest — structures, roles, classifications.

ontologies.name: Wikidata Properties Dump
ontologies.description: All Wikidata property definitions, labels, and descriptions. Large download.

ontologies.name: OpenCyc 4.0
ontologies.description: Large-scale upper ontology with common-sense knowledge — 239k concepts, 2M assertions.
